data.name: Dark Fantasy: Epic Jigsaw Puzzle
data.detailed_description:
WARNING: The main aim of the game is not hard eroticism/pornography. We marked adult-only, because it was required to us. Please do not expect any hard sexual content from the game. The screenshots show accurately the content you should expect from the game

The most atmospheric jigsaw puzzle game ever has come back!

  • 24 different jigsaw puzzles to complete
  • Each puzzle with 12, 24, 48, 96, 192 and 384 pieces
  • Save/load progress!
  • Highly replayable, hours of gameplay
  • The most atmospheric game of its genre
  • Two alternative evil voices male/female for commentary
  • Optional against time and no-cheat game modes
  • Great soundtrack and effects
  • 24 achievements
  • Leaderboards
  • Gallery for completed portraits
  • Different backgrounds

data.short_description: Assemble your way through the murky portraits of Dark Fantasy Epic!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 土耳其文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core™ 2 Duo 2.0+ GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2 or higher
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6 or above
  • 處理器: Intel Core™ 2 Duo 2.0+ GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2 or higher
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux Kernel 3.0 or above
  • 處理器: Intel Core™ 2 Duo 2.0+ GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2 or higher
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
